Document:
# Head of Security
“I have 5 officers screaming at me about a greytider revolt, a really pissed off Captain, an entire Space Dragon knocking on Engineering’s door and I’ve barely had time to eat a donut. [bold]Make it quick.[/bold]”
- Can carry a chosen longarm at all times, within reason. - Has final say over all [bold][color=#004d75]Security[/bold][/color]-related matters, except for Space Law as the Concord Frontier Authority Liaison has final say over it.
## Responsible For - Handing out Permits for Major Contraband & [bold][color=#004d75]Security Equipment[/bold][/color]. See: [bold][textlink="Warden" link="security-sop-warden"][/bold] - Ensuring Space Law, SoP & Prisoner’s Rights is followed by [bold][color=#004d75]Security[/bold][/color]. - Stating the reason for [bold][color=red]Code Red[/bold][/color], if it is called. - Ensuring [bold][color=#004d75]Cadet[/bold][/color] are assigned to [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officers[/bold][/color]. - Ensuring the [bold][color=#004d75]Security Borg[/bold][/color] is assigned to a [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color]. - Coordinating the [bold][color=#004d75]Security Department[/bold][/color], such as organizing patrols & undercover operations, assigning [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color] to areas of the station, deciding how to handle a chosen threat and leading [bold][color=#004d75]Security[/bold][/color] during a fight.
Standard [bold][color=green]Code Green[/bold][/color] Equipment:
or
in
or
or
